summary: Comprehensive testing of BM Hospitality travel website (Iteration 2). Verified all major changes: Instagram section removed, Goa star-rating filter form working, Golden Triangle replaced with Goa Beach Getaway, all forms submit to both backend API and WhatsApp. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI and form integration tests passed.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen readers - accessibility improvement recommended but not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: InstagramFollow component file exists but NOT imported in App.js - correctly removed from page
Goa Hotels & Resorts section has 3/4/5 star resort category selectors - working correctly
First domestic package is now 'Goa Beach Getaway' (not 'Golden Triangle') - verified
All forms implement dual submission (API + WhatsApp) - confirmed working
Flight Inquiry section has no MakeMyTrip text - verified clean
Hotels & Resorts worldwide form has email and WhatsApp fields - present and working
All API endpoints return success status with appropriate messages
seed_data_creation: Test data created via form submissions: TEST_Goa User (hotel inquiry), TEST_Quick User (travel inquiry)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 backend APIs verified working: /api/subscribe, /api/flight-inquiry, /api/hotel-inquiry, /api/contact, /api/inquiry. Instagram purple section confirmed removed (InstagramFollow.jsx exists but not imported). Goa section has 3/4/5 star resort category cards that work correctly. First domestic package confirmed as 'Goa Beach Getaway'. All forms do dual submission (backend API + WhatsApp redirect). Newsletter popup appears after 2 seconds.

features_verified.instagram_purple_section_removed: PASS - No 'Follow Us on Instagram' text, no purple Instagram section rendered
features_verified.goa_star_rating_filter: PASS - 3-Star, 4-Star, 5-Star resort category selectors present and clickable
features_verified.goa_form_fields: PASS - Check-in/out dates, adults, children, room type, meal plan, name, email, WhatsApp fields all present
features_verified.first_domestic_package_goa_beach_getaway: PASS - First domestic package is 'Goa Beach Getaway', not 'Golden Triangle'
features_verified.flight_inquiry_no_makemytrip: PASS - No MakeMyTrip text in Flight Inquiry section
features_verified.hotels_worldwide_form: PASS - Has email and WhatsApp fields, submits to POST /api/hotel-inquiry
features_verified.dual_submission_api_whatsapp: PASS - All forms trigger both backend API call AND WhatsApp redirect
